modules.sql: SELECT cp.customer_id, COUNT(*) AS preference_count, MAX(CASE WHEN cp.preference_type = 'MARKETING_EMAIL' AND cp.opted_in = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_email_opt_in, MAX(CASE WHEN cp.preference_type = 'MARKETING_SMS' AND cp.opted_in = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_sms_opt_in, cp.as_of FROM customer_preferences cp GROUP BY cp.customer_id, cp.as_of
